extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims their car's side mirror is missing or broken.

image_assessments.notes: A full side view of a car is shown, with the driver's side mirror visible and appearing intact.
A close-up of a car wheel and tire is shown; no side mirror is visible.

result.user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure which photo is clearest, but my side mirror is the issue. | Support: What happened to it? | Customer: It seems missing or broken after the car was parked outside. | Support: Should we ignore unrelated car photos if any? | Customer: Please focus on the side mirror claim.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed side_mirror with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (missing_part) is not visible. Images show 'none' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
